title: podman build: bash completion broken without buildah
body:
/kind bug

`podman build [TAB]` is broken when buildah is not installed. podman's bash-completion script references a function from buildah's script leading to the following error:

```
__buildah_to_extglob: command not found
```

I suspect that's a copy-paste error.

Cc: @baude 
Cc: @sysrich
